channel.title: Phonetica
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Phonetica

item.title: Vertical larynx actions and intergestural timing stability in Hausa ejectives and implosives
item.description: Article by Oliver Niebuhr DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phon-2023-0052

item.title: The acoustic characteristics of Swedish vowels
item.description: Article by Oliver Niebuhr DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/phon-2024-0011
